reason: Model tiers (L/B/H) as separate cards + computed VRAM↔RAM trade table (footprint = fileSize + per-family overhead, approach b). Brainstormed; footprint-formula investigation flagged as the one unknown.
Picking up for large plan + parallel footprint-formula investigation; implementing this session.

Large plan written after 4 parallel investigation agents (footprint formula VALIDATED against user 16GB/62GB box, registry, models-page UI, prompt-box). Phases A-E + parallel batch C/D. Field names resolved (sizeTier/modelFamily — tier+qualityTier both taken). Formula: ramNeeded=ceil((max(0,W-(V-actVRAM))+ramBase+8)/8)*8.

Phase A DONE + node-verified: footprint.js (formula module, constants OVERHEAD=1.3/k=0.25/MIN_FLOOR=8). Self-check PASS — reproduces user 4060 anchor (LTX bf16 16GB VRAM → raw 44GB RAM). Independently corroborated by a 50-datapoint GGUF rec-table sweep (fixed-overhead consensus ~0.75-1.5GB centers on 1.3; image-model k~1.0-1.15).

Phase B DONE + node-verified: ModelDef typedef + 7 entries tagged sizeTier (5 SDXL=low, wan-22+ltx-23=balanced) + modelFamily (Wan-2.2/LTX-2.3). Live tradeTable on real deps works: LTX local totalWeights=62.9GB → floor 15.7, 16GB→~56GB RAM; SDXL 6.7GB flat (8GB→0). All-weights sum kept (user OK with approx over-stating ~56 vs lived 44; safe direction, users land on 16/32/64/128).

Handoff created at clean A+B boundary (8d046089). Fresh session resumes Phase C (MpiModelManager filter+badge+computed MpiPopup hover table) + Phase D (MpiPromptBox L/B/H marker). Component-sensitive — handoff packs all 4 investigation findings (exact files/lines), the rule pointers, and the field-name collision warnings.

Phases C+D DONE + verified (ESLint 0 errors; live tradeTable on real registry deps, both engines). Phase C — MpiModelManager: 3 MpiButton L/B/H multi-select filter (no ALL, all-off=show all), per-card tier badge (sibling in card wrapper, --low/balanced/high tokens), hover MpiPopup with COMPUTED tradeTable() rows (not hardcoded), one-shot /system/stats fetch in onOpen caching userVramGb → table user-row highlight (suppressed remote via _isRemote→null). Phase D — MpiPromptBox._modelDropdownOptions: append L/B/H to label ONLY when 2+ installed share modelFamily (lone card = no letter). DELIBERATE SIMPLIFICATION: dropped the global matching-toggle highlight (no sound tier↔VRAM map; per-card table user-row is the real fit signal). New CSS in MpiModelManager.css (no new component file → no preloadStyles edit). STILL PENDING Phase E: end-to-end on the real 16GB/62GB box + a Pod.

UI polish round (user-driven, live-verified by user screenshots) + remote GPU highlight. (1) Badge/disk-size collision: disk size moved header-meta→info-row, labeled Disk: NN GB; old per-dep VRAM number + _vramOf() DELETED (tier badge+table own memory info now; dep.vram field now unused by card → flag for registry GC). (2) MpiPopup (PRIMITIVE): added vertical flip (top↔bottom by viewport room, BEM class+caret follow) + horizontal viewport clamp (center-anchored popup no longer spills off right edge near a card-corner badge). Both edge/room-gated so other popups unaffected. (3) Filter buttons were BLANK+dead: root cause MpiButton toggle fires ONLY in icon mode + text renders from props.text not props.label — filters passed label w/ no icon. Fixed: pass text, own toggle via click+setActive, added .is-active heat style. (4) REMOTE GPU highlight (answer to user Q: does detection work remote?): reused the SAME remote:connection payload {vramGb,phase} the status-bar memory monitor consumes — no new backend/fetch. _activeVramGb() picks local box VRAM vs LIVE Pod VRAM; connecting phase suppresses; engine already remote→GGUF curve, now highlight matches. Node-verified 4 states: local lights 16GB, connecting suppressed, connected-Pod lights Pod row (5090→32GB not 16), unknown-vram graceful. Lint 0 errors all rounds. STILL PENDING Phase E: full end-to-end on real box + a live Pod.

MPI-168 complete + validated. Phases A-E done; Pod generation PROVEN on live RTX 5090 (multiple gens, user-confirmed) using the shipped balanced-LTX path: fp4_mixed SHARED clip + merged soft+abliterated+detailer LoRA + Q8-GGUF transformer. Q4 GGUF Gemma clip dropped (OOM + ComfyUI key errors — wrong Gemma lineage). generate_ltx.py clip-swap reverted to unet-only; 8 workflows regenerated + audited; fp4 uploaded to R2; resolver + lint verified. Remote GPU highlight follows live Pod VRAM. RAM-fit sanity + LTX low/high tiers = out-of-scope follow-ups.
